incorrect_resource_type_queried: queried the wrong FHIR resource type for the requested clinical information
failure_to_remediate_multiple_orders: identified multiple orders but failed to perform the required cleanup action
pagination_loop_without_data_extraction: stuck in a loop of navigating search pages without extracting the target data
false_negative_medication_check: incorrectly concluded no active orders existed when they were present
incorrect_calculation_logic_applied: performed calculation using incorrect data points or time windows
insufficient_search_parameters_for_data: failed to retrieve data due to overly restrictive or incorrect search filters
incorrect_date_logic_evaluation: miscalculated the time interval between the last procedure and the current date
unnecessary_resource_creation_performed: created a new resource despite existing valid records
incorrect_action_logic_applied: performed an action that contradicted the protocol or failed to address the specific condition identified
false_negative_vital_sign_check: incorrectly concluded no vital sign data existed when it was present in the records
false_negative_procedure_check: incorrectly concluded no procedure records existed when they were present
incorrect_resource_field_value: created a resource with an incorrect field value (e.g., lowercase unit instead of required format)
